name: Hole N' Fun
author: Poki
description: Hole N' Fun is a car driving and stunt performing game where you throw robots into holes to collect points. Don't be fooled by the cute style of your car, it has quite a lot of power packed into it! Make use of your hook, boost and the power of physics by drifting. How many points can you get in this colorful, action-packed car adventure? How to play: Use your car to get robots into holes. Accelerate - W/S Hook - Left Mouse Button Boost - Right Mouse Button Drift - Left Shift Jump - Space About the creator: Hole N' Fun is created by KellyRayJ. Check out their other game Chicken Sword: Ninja Master on Poki!
